prestazioni: Engine: 1.8L Tipo 160.A2 (137 hp stock) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.5mm bore, 8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a balanced crankshaft by JE Pistons. Full port-and-polish of the cylinder head with oversized Ferrea Racing intake (43mm) and exhaust (36mm) valves, paired with titanium retainers and upgraded valve springs from Supertech Performance.

Forced induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Tubistyle, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (550x225x76mm core) and a custom 3-inch aluminum intake piping system with a K&N cone filter (part #57-1042). Boost controlled via a HKS EVC-S electronic boost controller targeting 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) with a custom ECU remap by Viezu Technologies (Stage 2+ aggressive timing map).

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF7J) in the stock Tipo transaxle, paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (part #3000 951 001) and a lightweight flywheel (3.8kg) from Fidanza. Custom half-shafts by The Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3, 300M steel) to handle increased torque. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #DFV 14410-01) with 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates by SPC Performance (part #81250), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1319K).
estetica: Bodywork: Full Rocket Bunny Tipo 16V widebody kit (part #RB-FIAT-TIPO-01) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders (2.5-inch flares), paired with a custom ducktail spoiler by Seibon Carbon. Front bumper modified with a custom mesh grille by Custom Car Grills (part #CCG-FIAT-TIPO) and integrated LED DRLs from LUX Automotive (part #LUX-DRL-10).

Wheels/Tires: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (16x8 +20 front, 16x9 +25 rear) with custom gold powdercoat, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (205/45/16 front, 225/45/16 rear). Brake system upgraded to Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (part #09.9404.11) with 280mm slotted rotors up front and 2-piston rear calipers (part #08.5251.10) with 256mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (part #391.200) with custom FIAT Tipo-specific mounting brackets by Corbeau, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (330mm, suede) and a NRG Innovations quick-release hub (part #NRG-202). Custom roll cage by Custom Cages (6-point, T45 steel, bolt-in) with padding from OMP. Full interior stripped and sound-deadened with Dynamat Xtreme, then reupholstered in Alcantara with red stitching by Cobra Seats. Custom gauge pod by Defi (part #DF11301) housing a 3-gauge setup (oil pressure, oil temp, boost) with white LED backlighting.
